description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that runs on push and pull request events, excluding README.md and LICENSE files. The workflow uses a Windows environment to build a project with Qt, using a matrix strategy to test different Qt versions, targets, and architectures. It caches Qt installations, installs Qt if the cache misses, checks out the code, builds the project with MSVC, and packages and uploads the build as a release asset if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
